name: test
query:
select PE.name,c.territory,
IFNULL((PE.total_allocated_amount), 0) as paid,
 IFNULL((PE.unallocated_amount), 0) as amount
    		    
    from `tabPayment Entry` PE
left join `tabCustomer` c on c.name = PE.party
    Where
		 PE.payment_type = 'Receive'
		    AND PE.docstatus = 1
		    AND PE.posting_date BETWEEN '2025-10-01' AND '2025-10-31'
            AND PE.company = 'ITFD PRODUCTS'
      group by 
         PE.name
